## Grow Weed Easy – Learn How to Grow Cannabis
**Grow WeedEasy.com teaches you how easy it is to grow weed. Come learn how! **Growing weed can be easy, though most “how to grow marijuana” tutorials make things seem like you need a degree in horticulture. The whole home grow process is actually straightforward and surprisingly simple when you know what to do!
* * *
## Stop Feeling Lost. It Gets Easier from Here.
Do you want a no-stress way to learn how to grow weed at home, from people who actually grow? Get growing delivered to you in small chunks. In a few weeks you’ll already know more than most other growers. Also get a Sunday newsletter at 4:20am with useful tips, live grow journals, and updates on what’s happening in the home grow world!

Enter Your Email:
We respect your [email privacy](https://www.aweber.com/permission.htm "Privacy Policy")
* * *
Grow Weed Easy.com was [started in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by home growers Sirius Fourside and Nebula Haze. Together, they’ve built a free online “encyclopedia of cannabis home grow” with [650+ expert home cannabis cultivation tutorials](https://www.growweedeasy.com/the-basics) about every aspect of growing weed.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/basics)[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-symptoms-pictures)[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-plant-training)
GrowWeedEasy.com shows you how easy it is to **grow your own marijuana** at home. Our goal? You grow as much top-shelf weed as possible, with as little time and effort as necessary to accomplish your desired yields and cannabis bud quality. If you want to start growing cannabis indoors for the first time, or if you’re already a pro grower and want to improve your current cannabis growing skill, this website is for you!
Want **dense** , **beautiful** , **potent** weed? Our new digital book shows you [how to harvest so buds turn out better](https://homegrowmasterclass.com/product/harvest-your-guide-to-the-good-part/).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/themes/growweedeasy/images/buds-piled-up-harvest2.jpg)
**Sign up for our newsletter (to the right) and get growing tips, tactics, and tutorials delivered to you weekly.**
#### You may be asking yourself these common growing questions:
### “How do I grow marijuana indoors?”
Read this [guide on how to grow marijuana indoors](https://www.growweedeasy.com/10-step-cannabis-grow-guide).
Or check out this article to [learn what materials you need to get started growing your own marijuana](https://www.growweedeasy.com/growing-cannabis-setup-examples)!
Luckily, it’s really easy to get a [cannabis seed to sprout](https://www.growweedeasy.com/germinate/)!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/themes/growweedeasy/images/cute-seedling-under-cfl-grow-light.jpg)
### “How much money will it cost to get started?”
If you’re considering growing weed, it costs as little as [$300 to get started growing](https://www.growweedeasy.com/harvest-up-to-4-oz-cannabis-in-this-100w-led-mini-grow-kit-complete-setup-weed-growing-tutorial) or a bit more for a [semi-automatic, high-yielding bubbleponics grow system](https://www.growweedeasy.com/high-yield-bubbleponics-technique).
See examples of [yields to expect, electricity use & startup costs](https://www.growweedeasy.com/growing-cannabis-setup-examples) for different setups.
Read this article to [see even more growing styles with different price ranges](https://www.growweedeasy.com/5-best-led-grow-lights-2025-cannabis-yields-speed-bud-quality).
### “Where can I get marijuana seeds?”
Check out our [How to Buy Marijuana Seeds Online Guide](https://www.growweedeasy.com/seeds) (with delivery to every state of the USA) to safely get your hands on good genetics. Starting with good seeds lets you choose the looks, smell, and effects of your buds!
[Learn where it’s safe to buy cannabis seeds online](https://www.growweedeasy.com/seed-bank-grow-weed-easy-2026-update) (2026 update).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/seed-bank-grow-weed-easy-2026-update)
[What do good cannabis seeds look like?](https://www.growweedeasy.com/what-do-cannabis-seeds-look-like)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/what-do-cannabis-seeds-look-like)
Learn about the best marijuana [beginner strains](https://www.growweedeasy.com/best-marijuana-strains-beginners) and [how to research and find the right strain](https://www.growweedeasy.com/find-strain).
Cannabis buds are generally green, but can also be [pink or purple](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-grow-purple-buds) with certain strains.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/themes/growweedeasy/images/purple-green-cannabis-bud.jpg)
### “How much will electricity cost each month?”
If you’re just growing a few marijuana plants for personal use, it will cost you $20-$100+/month for electricity, depending on what [grow lights](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-grow-lights/) (electricity) and [nutrients](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nutrients) you use. On average, I’d say a hobby-size grower might pay about $50/month to grow, but it depends greatly on your setup and local electricity costs!
[How much will electricity cost each month?](https://www.growweedeasy.com/whats-the-cost-of-electricity-to-grow-marijuana)
### “How can I increase my marijuana yields?”
We have quite a few techniques to choose from or combine! See some of our most popular pages:
  * [Super Cropping](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-super-crop-marijuana) – A simple technique to bigger yields
  * [Simplest Guide to Growing Short & Bushy Marijuana Plants](https://www.growweedeasy.com/simple-cannabis-plant-training-guide)
  * [LST (Low Stress Training)](https://www.growweedeasy.com/low-stress-training-lst/) – Training your plants can easily double your harvest!
  * Or check out our page on the [controversial defoliation technique](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nebulas-flowering-stage-defoliation-tutorial)

_Even More Ways to Increase Cannabis Yields_
  1. [Increase Light Intensity](https://www.growweedeasy.com/increase-yields-indoors#increase-light-intensity) (plus [choose right light for desired yields](https://www.growweedeasy.com/growing-cannabis-setup-examples) & possibly add [CO2](https://www.growweedeasy.com/co2))
  2. [Manipulate How Plants Grow](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-plant-training) (a free way to yield more bud indoors)
  3. [Provide Right Nutrients](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nutrients) (low Nitrogen in the flowering stage, and remember sometimes less is more!)
  4. [Control Growing Environment](https://www.growweedeasy.com/perfect-growing-environment) (let the growing environment work for you)
  5. [Harvest Plants Properly](https://www.growweedeasy.com/harvest) (most importantly, don’t harvest early!)
  6. Lastly, it’s important to remember that [the strain has a  _major_ effect on yields](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-increase-yields-indoors#genetics)!

Two small cannabis plants can yield several ounces of premium weed!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/themes/growweedeasy/images/good-height-cannabis-big-colas-ready-harvest.jpg)
### “How can I grow weed privately?”
Read guide on [growing weed indoors without anyone knowing](https://www.growweedeasy.com/privacy-growing-weed).
But remember the **most** important factors to stealth growing:_“No tell, no smell, no sell.”_
Never tell anyone, not even your best friend, that you’re growing. Be on top of [preventing smells](https://www.growweedeasy.com/smell), and never ever sell cannabis. Breaking one of those 3 principles is how 99% of growers get found out!
### “What if my plants get sick?”
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-symptoms-pictures)The most common issue a grower runs into is a [pH imbalance](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-do-i-check-the-pH-of-my-water). Barring that, your marijuana plants likely either have a [nutrient deficiency](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-symptoms-pictures), [heat or light stress](https://www.growweedeasy.com/heat-light-stress), or are being attacked by some sort of [marijuana mold, pest or bug](https://www.growweedeasy.com/bugs-pests-symptoms-marijuana-grow).
Whether you call it weed, cannabis, sinsemilla, skunk, pot, marijuana, or something else, the plant known as _Cannabis Sativa_ is a hardy weed in the wild and can actually be easy to grow indoors at home when you know what to do.
### Growing Medical Marijuana
“Medical marijuana” has become a household name. The body of evidence for medical marijuana in the treatment of cancer and other illnesses is growing every day.
And for those who need medical marijuana, growing weed indoors is the perfect way to ensure a safe, regular supply of buds, for **cheap**. In fact, when you grow weed indoors for personal use, **you often end up with _way too much_**.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/themes/growweedeasy/images/sativas-sour-diesel-cannabis-cola.jpg)
If you catch the growing bug like I did, and if you start enjoying the process of tending your cannabis garden just for the sake of gardening, you’re going to have to find a way to [press](https://www.growweedeasy.com/homemade-rosin-dabs), [cook](https://www.growweedeasy.com/best-weed-butter-recipe), [freeze](https://www.growweedeasy.com/dry-ice-hash), and [concentrate](https://www.growweedeasy.com/hash-oil-aka-rso-cannabis-extract-oil) all your extra buds. 🙂
As you probably know, both medical marijuana and recreational cannabis have been decriminalized or legalized in many places around the world and weed is becoming legal in more places every day!
Yet there still aren’t many simple indoor “how to grow weed” guides for beginners (even for those who legally grow, such as medical marijuana users and those who live in places where marijuana is legalized for personal use).
If so, I know how you feel. It can be hard to weed out all the bad information on the internet and find well-researched, free tips or instructions on how to grow your own cannabis.
That’s why Grow Weed Easy.com aims to be a simple online resource that explains from start to finish what you need to do when growing cannabis so you can learn how to grow cannabis with great yields and potent buds, even if you only have a small grow space like a closet or even a computer case! We’ve grown cannabis out of closets and have gotten ounces of buds and you can too.
Grow Weed Easy.com covers many popular cannabis cultivation topics, including:
  * A comparison between different [cannabis grow lights](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-grow-lights/) including experience-based information about [LED grow lights](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-grow-lights#LED)
  * A page that teaches you the [basics of how to grow weed](https://www.growweedeasy.com/basics/)
  * Detailed [how-to weed growing tutorials](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-guides)
  * [How to start growing weed tomorrow](https://www.growweedeasy.com/quickest-guide-to-growing-cannabis) (simplest cannabis growing guide!)
  * [Grow 4 oz with a 100W LED](https://www.growweedeasy.com/harvest-up-to-4-oz-cannabis-in-this-100w-led-mini-grow-kit-complete-setup-weed-growing-tutorial) <– An Easy Way to Start Growing!
  * Our famous grow guide that teaches you [how to grow weed using bubbleponics (hydro)](https://www.growweedeasy.com/high-yield-bubbleponics-technique).

# **[Start Growing Weed Today!](https://www.growweedeasy.com/basics)**
Grow Weed Easy is run by a panel of experienced cannabis growers, including the founders **Nebula Haze** and **Sirius Fourside** , who originally teamed together to bring you GrowWeedEasy.com.
Due to the demand for more marijuana growing information, we’ve also started an [inbox magazine all about how to grow weed](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about), with additional tutorials, tips, and tactics sent to you each week. Simply sign up to start getting free expert growing articles delivered to you!
All the information available at GrowWeedEasy.com is completely free and we regularly update the site and make new additions.
#### **Looking for a growing book?**
**If you _are_ interested in doing a bit of reading** or would like to know more about the science behind marijuana hydroponics or horticulture, I strongly recommend viewing our page of [Marijuana Grow Book Reviews](https://www.growweedeasy.com/best-marijuana-grow-bible-review).
[Read reviews of marijuana grow books](https://www.growweedeasy.com/best-marijuana-grow-bible-review).
We would love to hear about your experiences with growing cannabis. Whether you are a pro grower already or are just starting your first plant, we have learned so much from our readers both beginners and masters!
If you have any suggestions, comments, concerns, or just want to ask some questions about your marijuana grow, please [contact us](https://www.growweedeasy.com/website-feedback)!
**Happy Growing!**
_Nebula Haze & Sirius Fourside_
